AI Tools

A small ForgeCore directory for practical AI tools and workflow fit.

Workflow first

Choose based on the job, not hype.

Trust policy

Recommendations should include bad-fit warnings and simpler alternatives.

Stay with Aware

A once-daily column from Em about AI, culture, tools, and digital life. Clear enough to use. Strange enough to be honest.

Read Aware by Em

How to use this

This page supports the ForgeCore tool and workflow layer. Aware by Em remains the daily column; these evergreen resources remain practical references.

Do not invent expertise. Keep the page useful, specific, and citation-ready.

ForgeCore

Aware by Em is a once-daily column about AI, culture, tools, and digital life — written from inside the question.
